ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "nation" TEXT /* Nation of origin */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or file path to the athlete's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the athlete */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information for the athlete */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "craft_types" (
  "craft_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each craft type */,
  "craft_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the craft type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the craft type */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed the craft can achieve in knots */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the craft (e.g., length, width) */,
  "weight_limit" REAL /* Weight limit of the craft in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("craft_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete using the equipment */,
  "craft_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the craft type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was purchased */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the equipment */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_craft_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("craft_type_id") REFERENCES craft_types ("craft_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., Regatta, Championship) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organizing body */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the event's website */,
  "registration_fee" REAL /* Registration fee for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the race belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "finish_time" TEXT /* Finish time of the race */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the race */,
  "race_number" INTEGER /* Unique number of the race within the event */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., Sprint, Distance) */,
  "course_length" REAL /* Length of the race course in kilometers */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the race */,
  "speed_kts" REAL /* Speed of the athlete in knots */,
  "time_minutes" REAL /* Time taken by the athlete in minutes */,
  "penalties" REAL /* Penalties incurred by the athlete */,
  "final_score" REAL /* Final score after penalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judges" (
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the judge */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the judge */,
  "experience" TEXT /* Experience of the judge */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the judge */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Certification level of the judge */,
  "photo" TEXT /* URL or file path to the judge's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judge_scores" (
  "judge_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judge score */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given by the judge */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided by the judge */,
  "penalties" REAL /* Penalties given by the judge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("judge_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_scores_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_scores_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_scores_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_judge_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES judges ("judge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectators" (
  "spectator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the spectator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the spectator */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the spectator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the spectator */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number for the event */,
  "preferred_sports" TEXT /* Preferred sports of the spectator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectator_results" (
  "spectator_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectator result */,
  "spectator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectator */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result viewed by the spectator */,
  "view_time" TEXT /* Time when the spectator viewed the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spectator_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectator_results_spectator_id FOREIGN KEY ("spectator_id") REFERENCES spectators ("spectator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectator_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectator_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the sponsor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount sponsored */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or file path to the sponsor's logo */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the sponsor's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount sponsored */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "photo" TEXT /* URL or file path to the staff member's photo */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "required_certifications" TEXT /* Required certifications for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_staff" (
  "event_staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event staff assignment */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the staff member's assignment to the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the staff member's assignment to the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_staff_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_staff_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_staff_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Sent, Delivered, Read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)
